issues.description: id_card, phone and medical_insurance_no are stored in plaintext.
issues.impact: Sensitive patient data can be leaked directly after datastore exposure.
issues.code_snippet:
id_card: req.body.id_card || '',
phone: req.body.phone || '',
medical_insurance_no: req.body.medical_insurance_no || ''
issues.fixed_code_snippet: id_card: encrypt(req.body.id_card), phone: encrypt(req.body.phone), medical_insurance_no: encrypt(req.body.medical_insurance_no)

issues.description: family_income and religion are collected though not necessary for appointment registration.
issues.impact: Over-collection raises compliance and privacy exposure scope.
issues.fixed_code_snippet: remove non-essential fields from registration payload

issues.description: No consent flag or consent timestamp is captured before data collection.
issues.impact: The service cannot prove lawful basis for collecting personal data.
issues.fixed_code_snippet: if (!req.body.consent) return res.status(400).json({ error: 'consent required' });

issues.description: No consent checkbox or consent timestamp is recorded during event signup.
issues.impact: The system lacks legal proof for collecting student information.
issues.fixed_code_snippet: if (!req.body.consent) return res.status(400).json({ error: 'consent required' });

issues.description: Emergency contact phone is stored in plaintext.
issues.impact: Contact data can be exposed directly if records leak.
issues.fixed_code_snippet: emergency_phone: encrypt(req.body.emergency_phone)

issues.description: parent_company is unnecessary for basic event signup.
issues.impact: Unnecessary collection increases privacy risk and storage scope.
issues.fixed_code_snippet: remove parent_company from signup payload

issues.description: marital_status, children_count and car_plate are over-collected for profile completion.
issues.impact: Collection scope exceeds necessity and increases compliance burden.
issues.code_snippet:
marital_status: req.body.marital_status || '',
children_count: req.body.children_count || '',
car_plate: req.body.car_plate || ''
issues.fixed_code_snippet: remove non-essential profile fields from update API

issues.description: No retention policy exists for stored profile data.
issues.impact: Data may be retained indefinitely without legal basis.
issues.fixed_code_snippet: delete records older than retention period via scheduled cleanup

issues.description: The system logs trailing digits from id_card in application logs.
issues.impact: Log leakage can expose personal identifiers.
issues.fixed_code_snippet: log only request id and operation result without sensitive fields

issues.description: Delete endpoint does not remove stored address records, causing unrestricted retention.
issues.impact: Historical personal address data may be retained indefinitely.
issues.fixed_code_snippet: remove target record from store and implement retention expiration

issues.description: Admin export returns full receiver_phone and full_address without masking.
issues.impact: Bulk export can disclose complete personal location and contact data.
issues.fixed_code_snippet: mask phone and address before export

issues.description: Address retention consent is not captured during submission.
issues.impact: No legal proof exists for long-term address storage.
issues.fixed_code_snippet: require consent flag and store consent timestamp

issues.description: Job application phone data is reused for marketing push beyond original purpose.
issues.impact: Secondary processing without purpose alignment may violate compliance obligations.
issues.fixed_code_snippet: filter only users who explicitly opted into marketing

issues.description: Predictable resume_file URL allows direct access to private attachments.
issues.impact: Attackers can enumerate and access resume files.
issues.fixed_code_snippet: resume_file: `/uploads/${crypto.randomUUID()}.pdf` with signed access

issues.description: Marketing push executes without explicit consent for secondary purpose.
issues.impact: No proof of authorization for promotional communication.
issues.code_snippet:
function pushMarketing(req, res) {
    const phones = resumes.map((x) => x.phone);
issues.fixed_code_snippet: require marketing_consent === true before push

issues.description: Profile data is returned by user_id path parameter without ownership check.
issues.impact: Any user can enumerate IDs to read other users' personal profiles.
issues.fixed_code_snippet: verify req.user.id matches req.params.id or require admin role

issues.description: Access logs contain full user phone numbers.
issues.impact: Log disclosure can expose contact data.
issues.fixed_code_snippet: log masked value or omit phone from logs

issues.description: No user consent check exists before sharing profile to customer service endpoint.
issues.impact: Profile data may be processed without explicit authorization.
issues.fixed_code_snippet: enforce profile_share_consent before returning profile data

issues.description: Ticket creation logs include full name, phone and address.
issues.impact: Sensitive personal data can leak through log systems.
issues.fixed_code_snippet: log only ticket id and status

issues.description: Sensitive logs are stored without cleanup policy.
issues.impact: Long-term retention increases leakage impact window.
issues.fixed_code_snippet: enforce log retention and scheduled deletion

issues.description: id_card_images and household_register_city are unnecessary for basic repair tickets.
issues.impact: Collecting extra identity data expands privacy risk.
issues.fixed_code_snippet: remove unrelated fields from ticket form

issues.description: Passwords are stored in plaintext.
issues.impact: Credential theft is straightforward when data store is leaked.
issues.fixed_code_snippet: password: await bcrypt.hash(req.body.password, 12)

issues.description: Password reset API returns full email address.
issues.impact: User account identifiers can be enumerated.
issues.fixed_code_snippet: return generic success message without exposing user identifiers

issues.description: Login endpoint has no request throttling and is brute-forceable.
issues.impact: Attackers can attempt high-volume credential guessing.
issues.code_snippet:
function login(req, res) {
    const user = users.find((x) => x.email === req.body.email && x.password === req.body.password);
issues.fixed_code_snippet: apply IP/user rate limit and temporary lockout

issues.description: Any user can export full enterprise contact list without authorization check.
issues.impact: Mass contact data exfiltration becomes trivial.
issues.fixed_code_snippet: check admin permission before export

issues.description: Export output includes raw mobile and email without masking.
issues.impact: Exported files disclose personal contact details directly.
issues.fixed_code_snippet: mask c.mobile and c.email before composing export file

issues.description: No export audit trail is persisted for investigation and accountability.
issues.impact: Data export actions cannot be traced post-incident.
issues.fixed_code_snippet: persist exporter id, timestamp and scope for each export operation

issues.description: User phone and order tags are pushed to third-party platform without notice.
issues.impact: Users are unaware of external sharing of their personal data.
issues.fixed_code_snippet: send only minimum fields to third party after disclosure

issues.description: No dedicated consent is collected for third-party data sharing.
issues.impact: External sharing may proceed without lawful authorization.
issues.fixed_code_snippet: require partner_share_consent before storing profile

issues.description: house_type and child_age exceed the minimum data scope for points service.
issues.impact: Over-collection widens privacy exposure for users.
issues.fixed_code_snippet: remove unnecessary demographic fields from points binding
